3D chaibi style, blind box toys, celluloid rendering style, cute big head shape, smooth plastic texture
Origami style, paper art, geometric folding, low-poly texture, flat shading
Irasutoya style, flat design, simple vector illustration, cute characters
Graffiti art style, thick lines, high contrast colors
graphite sketch, hatching shadows, rough texture
anime style, Makoto Shinkai, vibrant eyes
3D cartoon style, Pixar style, ancient Chinese cartoon style

Chinese Gongbi science fiction style, with the delicate lines and delicate depiction techniques of Chinese gongbi painting, expresses science fiction themes, such as the combination of ancient style flying and future technology aircraft, showing a unique oriental science fiction imagination.

Folk style, integrated into the folk culture elements of a specific region, such as folklore, traditional clothing, characteristic architecture, etc., the colors and patterns are full of strong local characteristics, showing the local customs.

Folk embroidery style, imitating the stitches and patterns of folk embroidery, using delicate lines and rich colors to build a picture, with a strong folk handicraft texture, showing the charm of traditional folk culture.
Art Nouveau focuses on drawing inspiration from natural forms, with beautiful and smooth lines, full of curves, often using plants, insects and other elements, and is highly decorative.

Sci-fi wasteland style, depicting the scene of the future world being reduced to ruins due to disasters and other reasons, combined with sci-fi elements, such as dilapidated high-tech equipment, mutated creatures, etc., with gray colors, conveying a sense of desolation, dilapidation and apocalypse.

Ocean fantasy style, with the ocean as the theme, incorporating fantasy elements, such as huge mysterious sea monsters, glowing coral forests, swimming crystal palaces, and most of the colors are blue, turquoise and other ocean tones, showing a dreamlike underwater wonder.

Fairy tale style, full of childlike fun and fantasy, bright and bright colors, cute and exaggerated images, often depicting fairy tale elements such as castles, elves, magical creatures, etc., showing an innocent and beautiful dream world.

Paper art collage style, simulating the effect of paper art hand-collage, the picture is composed of paper pieces of different colors and textures, and there are hand-cut traces on the edge of the graphic, creating a retro and creative artistic sense.

The steam-fantasy watercolor style combines the mechanical aesthetic of steampunk with the freshness and transparency of watercolor. The steam-filled mechanical castle is soft and layered in colors under a watercolor-stained sky, revealing a dreamlike and poetic world of steam.

The candy dream style is full of sweet and dreamy colors, mainly soft and sweet tones such as pink and purple, and the common candy-shaped buildings, cloud-like marshmallows, and cute dreamy creatures in the picture create a sweet world like a fairy tale.

Ink Zen style, the use of ink painting techniques to convey Zen, the picture is often expressed in a concise landscape, ethereal artistic conception, the blank space is full of charm, the color is elegant, let people feel the quiet and far-reaching oriental philosophy.

Space wasteland style, depicting abandoned scenes in the universe, such as a ruined space station, scrapped starships floating in the dark universe, with cool colors and broken textures, creating a barren and lonely post-apocalyptic space atmosphere.

Bohemian fairy tale style, combining bohemian free-spirited, colorful and fairy tale romantic fantasy. The paintings are full of bright colors and intricate patterns, depicting elves and fairies living in exotic forests or small towns.

Minimalist fairy tale style, with minimalist clean lines and pure colors, outlining fairy tale scenes. Remove complicated details, use the most concise graphics and colors to convey the innocence and beauty of fairy tales, giving people a concise and profound visual experience.

The style of dark fairy tale graffiti, combining the weird atmosphere of dark fairy tales and the casual freedom of graffiti, depicts dark fairy tale scenes with exaggerated and distorted lines and bright and dark colors, such as dilapidated castles and evil witches, full of mystery and rebellion.

Oriental fantasy style, rooted in Oriental myths and legends and Xianxia culture, common flying sky, mythical beasts, magic weapons, fantasy spells and other elements, the picture is colorful and mysterious, showing the fantasy world of Oriental Xianxia full of fantasy imagination.

Steam fantasy comic style, using the narrative and expression techniques of comics, showing the world of steam fantasy. Full of dynamic graphics, depicting steam-powered adventures, vivid characters and imaginative plots.

Polar style, the picture often shows the unique landscapes of the polar regions, such as glaciers, snow-capped mountains, aurora aurora and so on, with a cold tone, creating a vast, cold and mysterious atmosphere.Maintain the same posture

The cyberpunk national style style integrates traditional Chinese cultural elements with cyberpunk style, such as traditional architecture with neon lights, ancient chivalrous images combined with mechanical prosthetics, showing a unique oriental cyber future scene，Maintain the same posture
